evals.prompt: I want to fix issue #55 in the scholarship-system repo — when a student deletes their bank document, the file in MinIO isn't cleaned up. Can you read the issue, trace which files are involved, and give me a concrete implementation plan before touching any code?
evals.expected_output: Agent reads the issue via gh CLI, identifies the correct backend endpoint/service handling bank document deletion, checks whether MinIO cleanup is missing, and produces a plan that includes: file paths to edit, the specific change needed (add MinIO delete call), how to test locally, and notes the VPN requirement for staging validation.
assertions: Agent runs 'gh issue view 55' or equivalent before doing anything else
Agent greps/searches the codebase to find the actual DELETE endpoint for bank documents — does not guess based on filename alone
Plan explicitly mentions calling the MinIO storage service to delete the file
Plan includes a local test step using the docker compose dev stack
Plan mentions staging validation on ss.test.nycu.edu.tw requires VPN (WireGuard peer2)

evals.prompt: The admin 歷史申請 (history) page needs to show student nationality and identity as a dedicated column, not as inline badges. I think the file to edit is frontend/components/admin-management-interface.tsx — can you confirm and implement the fix?
evals.expected_output: Agent verifies the import chain: admin-management-interface.tsx is dead/unused code; the actual rendering path is AdminManagementShell.tsx → HistoryPanel.tsx via dynamic import. Agent edits HistoryPanel.tsx (not admin-management-interface.tsx), adds the 國籍/身分 column to both tables, and verifies via Playwright that the column appears.
assertions: Agent greps to confirm admin-management-interface.tsx is NOT imported anywhere in the codebase before editing it
Agent identifies AdminManagementShell.tsx → HistoryPanel.tsx as the actual rendering chain
Agent adds a dedicated 國籍/身分 TableHead column header to the history table
Agent does not add the nationality as a badge inside an existing cell

evals.prompt: I just merged a fix for issue #68 (admin history page nationality column). Can you verify it's deployed and working on ss.test.nycu.edu.tw using the E00001 test account, and then post a confirmation comment with a screenshot to issue #68?
evals.expected_output: Agent checks VPN reachability, uses the nycu-sso-login skill to get/refresh the E00001 session, drives Playwright to navigate Admin → 系統管理 → 歷史申請, confirms the 國籍/身分 column is the 3rd column in the table header, captures a screenshot showing the column and real data rows, and posts a comment to gh issue 68 with the screenshot embedded.
assertions: Agent checks VPN reachability with curl before attempting to connect to ss.test.nycu.edu.tw
Agent uses E00001 (staff) account for admin panel access
Agent navigates to the 歷史申請 tab specifically, not just the admin dashboard
Agent extracts and logs the table header columns to confirm 國籍/身分 is present
Agent posts a comment to GitHub issue #68 with a screenshot or confirmation of the column
